title: Non-record: Hash-Gated Embeddings + QAT + Two-Pass Latent Compression + Depth Recurrence
author: seekerPrice

data.description: Hash-gated additive compositional embeddings using multiple hashed base vectors instead of a full embedding table.
Two-pass latent compression during training, with a second forward pass using projected stop-gradient softmax outputs as additional input; single-pass at evaluation.
Factored embeddings using a low-rank [V x R] x [R x D] decomposition to reduce embedding bytes.
Reuses physical layers to create more virtual layers without additional parameters.
Attention and MLP operate in parallel on the same pre-residual input in later layers.

novel_contributions: Hash-gated additive compositional embeddings to reduce embedding parameters and logit computation cost
Quantization-aware training from early steps using a straight-through estimator
Two-pass latent compression training with single-pass inference
Depth recurrence to create more virtual layers from fewer physical layers
Parallel residual connections in later layers
Weight entropy regularization to improve zlib compression
